Plot ignition detection results (faceted)

Source: R/m0_retro.R
plot_det_facet.Rd

Convenience plotter for the output of `detectIgnitionBySeason()` / `tuneIgnitionGrid()`. Draws week-by-week signals and estimated ignition week by season.

Usage

plot_det_facet(det_out, smooth_col = NULL)

Arguments

det_out

Output from `detectIgnitionBySeason()` (or a compatible object that includes the per-week signals and season identifiers).

smooth_col

Optional name of a column in `det_out$signals` (or equivalent) used for an additional smooth/line layer. Default `NULL`.

Value

A ggplot object.

On this page
